'''鈭歽-w-r-ch''' ('''kayawrechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lute|lute]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lute|lute]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-w-r-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kayawrechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyawrechoko|thiyawrechoko]] || [[word:jiyawrechoko|jiyawrechoko]] || [[word:shiyawrechoko|shiyawrechoko]] || [[word:kiyawrechoko|kiyawrechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyawrechoko|thoyawrechoko]] || [[word:joyawrechoko|joyawrechoko]] || [[word:shoyawrechoko|shoyawrechoko]] || [[word:koyawrechoko|koyawrechoko]]
|-

|-

|-
